LightningComponentBundle.description: Responsive product card grid component using SLDS grid system. Displays products in a responsive grid with 4 columns on desktop, 2 columns on tablet, and 1 column on mobile. Features SLDS card styling with elevation shadows and hover effects.
LightningComponentBundle.masterLabel: Responsive Product Card Grid Using SLDS

property.name: products
property.label: Products (JSON Array)
property.description: JSON array of product objects. Each product should have: id, name, price, imageUrl
